---
title: "Home"
---

# Maddie Geschke

Welcome! I’m **Maddie Geschke**, a Data Analytics major interested in **(your interests here: data visualization, analytics engineering, sports analytics, public health, etc.)**.

## What you’ll find here
- A few projects I’m proud of
- The tools I use (R, Python, SQL, Tableau/Power BI, Excel)
- Ways to contact me

::: callout-note
**Tip:** This site is built with Quarto. It’s designed to be reproducible and easy to update as your work evolves.
:::

## Quick highlights
- **Skills:** R, tidyverse, SQL, data visualization, statistical modeling, Python, Power BI  
- **Interests:** Making comprehensible and useful visualizations !
- **Currently seeking:** Full Time Roles after May 2027 in the Data Analyst/Statistical world

## Contact
- Email: geschk_m1@denison.edu
- GitHub: https://github.com/geschkem  
- LinkedIn: www.linkedin.com/in/maddie-geschke
